question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/transfer.go -> Scope: Medium: Theft of unpaid staking rewards'] [Function: submitWithRetry()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_TO_ACCOUNT_ID to their own staking-enabled account so that every periodic CryptoTransfer executed by submitWithRetry() triggers automatic staking-reward payout to that account, draining unpaid rewards that would otherwise accrue to the legitimate destination?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/transfer.go -> Scope: Medium: Theft of unpaid staking rewards'] [Function: submitWithRetry()] Can an unprivileged user supply a negative cfg.amountTinybar (only validated as != 0 in loadConfig()) so that AddHbarTransfer(toID, HbarFromTinybar(cfg.amountTinybar)) becomes a debit against toID, reversing the transfer direction and pulling funds—including pending staking rewards—out of the destination account into the operator account?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/transfer.go -> Scope: Medium: Theft of unpaid staking rewards'] [Function: submitWithRetry()] Can an unprivileged user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_TO_ACCOUNT_ID to account 0.0.800 (the Hedera staking reward account) so that each CryptoTransfer in submitWithRetry() touches that account and forces an unintended staking-reward distribution event, redirecting rewards away from legitimate stakers?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/transfer.go -> Scope: Medium: Theft of unpaid staking rewards'] [Function: submitWithRetry()] Can an unprivileged user configure cfg.toAccountID to point to an account they control that has a large accumulated but unpaid staking reward balance, causing the periodic submitWithRetry() loop to repeatedly trigger reward settlement on that account and collect those rewards without the account owner's consent?
